sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Singlamteh lam tawn in ka ciah kul ding hi,
Tua lo lam dang om lopi ,
Tua khuavak kong pi tungthei ngei kei ning,
Singlamteh lam ka khialh khak leh

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Singlamteh in lam hong hilh
Singlamteh in lam hong hilh
Mailam ka pai ciang in nuam semsem ding,
Singlamteh in inn lam hong hilh.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Singlamteh phung ka van teng tolh khia khin hi,
Topa mai ka muh ciangin,
Lungtai tak tua lam dawnding kong ki pan,
Ka lung sung phat na tawh ki dim.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Si kithehna lam tawn ka ciah suak ding hi,
Topa totsa lampi mah,
Adawn dongin kei ka kah toh theih leh,
Pasian inn sung ka kha teng ding.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Singlamteh lampi Topa'n tawn masa in
kei a dingin hong si hi,
Tua lam baih tuan lo,
A ma a dingin nuntakna thak ka muhna hi.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Leitung lampi mangpha ka khak ta ding hi,
Tua lampi tawnnawn kei ning,
Topa' kongpi pan hong ciah in hong ci,
Inn lam zuan in kei ciah ta ning.
